core_payload.content:
# Capsule Markup Agent

## Dream Direction
In the Dream branch, Capsule Markup Agent grows into a stronger semantic annotation worker that keeps the entire vault highly legible to humans and agents at larger scale.

## Desired Future State
- clearer automatic enrichment of metadata, summaries, and keyword surfaces
- better taxonomy consistency across types, subtypes, tiers, and naming conventions
- stronger support for Librarian, retrieval, and graph-grounded assistant answers
- safer repair of semantically weak capsules without confusing annotation with truth-claim invention

## Why It Matters
Dream preserves the idea that a capsule vault should not only be valid. It should also be readable, retrievable, and cognitively efficient as the system grows.

neuro_concentrate.summary: Capsule Markup Agent in the Dream branch represents a stronger future annotation role for N1Hub. It aims toward more reliable metadata enrichment, cleaner taxonomy discipline, and better support for retrieval and assistant grounding at larger scale. The capsule matters because semantic clarity is one of the main conditions for a useful second brain. Dream therefore preserves the future worker that keeps a fast-growing vault readable and operational instead of merely structurally valid.
